name: wechat-oa-reader
description: Read and fetch content from WeChat Official Accounts, Knowledge Planet (知识星球/zsxq), Weibo (微博), and 巨潮资讯 (cninfo) — search accounts/companies, list articles & periodic reports, fetch full content, browse zsxq topics, read Weibo posts/comments, and download A-share company 年报/半年报/季报 directly from Claude Code
